subject: Movie Production
body:
Good Morning Jeffrey,

I hope you don't mind me bringing this up again, but I had a chance to meet
with the head of this new company/fund  (see attachment for details) again
last night and the more I heard about it, the more it sounded like a great
project: a nice way to get into movie production, while making a stable
profit.  

I am sure that you have many more contacts in this arena than I do and that
if you wanted to join this industry at any moment, you could...but, would
you consider meeting with me and him, to discuss this particular investment?


We'd be happy to sit down anywhere with you and at your convenience.  

I hope you're well.  Please advise.

Best,
Jen Doyle



-----Original Message-----
From: Jen Doyle [mailto:jennifercdoyle@gmail.com] 
Sent: Friday, August 24, 2007 3:58 PM
To: 'jeeproject@yahoo.com'
Subject: Happy Summer! + Business Proposal


Hi Jeffrey,

How are you?  I hope that you are having a wonderful summer and that you'll
forgive me for not saying hello more often.  ...I bumped into Sarah in
Brooklyn about a month and a half ago and it was great to see her. She said
that everyone was doing well and I was glad to hear it.   

Meanwhile, I hope you don't mind me contacting re: a business proposal that
was passed on to me, in the hopes that I might know some interested
investors.  

I don't have the business saavy to know whether the proposal looks
financially worth your while (or anyone's for that matter), but when it came
my way, I thought of you and in turn, that I would pass it along, in the
case that you might be interested.  

>From my understanding, it's a proposal which seeks participation in a fund
which will finance/profit from the production of 4-5 movies a year, for the
next 5 years.  

I hope you'll consider taking a quick look and if it piques your interest at
all, I would be happy to put you in contact with the appropriate principals.
It comes from a reliable and very successful source + it looks sound to
me...but, I really am naïve when it comes to these things, so don't hesitate
to tell me that it looks ridiculous or if it simply wouldn't be worth your
time or investment. 

As always, thanks for everything that you've ever done for me and in
advance, for the time that it takes you to look at/consider the content of
the attached document.  

Please say hi to Ghislaine for me.  
Wishing you the best!  

Thanks,
Jen Doyle

Good Morning Jeffrey,

I hope you don't mind me bringing this up again, but I had a chance to meet
with the head of this new company/fund (see attachment for details) again
last night and the more I heard about it, the more it sounded like a great
project: a nice way to get into movie production, while making a stable
profit.

I am sure that you have many more contacts in this arena than I do and that
if you wanted to join this industry at any moment, you could...but, would
you consider meeting with me and him, to discuss this particular investment?

We'd be happy to sit down anywhere with you and at your convenience.

I hope you're well. Please advise.

Best,
Jen Doyle

From: Jen Doyle [mailto:jennifercdoyle@gmail.com]
Sent: Friday, August 24, 2007 3:58 PM
To: 'jeeproject@yahoo.com'
Subject: Happy Summer! + Business Proposal

Hi Jeffrey,

How are you? I hope that you are having a wonderful summer and that you'll
forgive me for not saying hello more often. ...I bumped into Sarah in
Brooklyn about a month and a half ago and it was great to see her. She said
that everyone was doing well and I was glad to hear it.

Meanwhile, I hope you don't mind me contacting re: a business proposal that
was passed on to me, in the hopes that I might know some interested
investors.

I don't have the business saavy to know whether the proposal looks
financially worth your while (or anyone's for that matter), but when it came
my way, I thought of you and in turn, that I would pass it along, in the
case that you might be interested.

From my understanding, it's a proposal which seeks participation in a fund
which will finance/profit from the production of 4-5 movies a year, for the
next 5 years.

I hope you'll consider taking a quick look and if it piques your interest at
all, I would be happy to put you in contact with the appropriate principals.
It comes from a reliable and very successful source + it looks sound to
me...but, I really am naïve when it comes to these things, so don't hesitate
to tell me that it looks ridiculous or if it simply wouldn't be worth your
time or investment.

As always, thanks for everything that you've ever done for me and in
advance, for the time that it takes you to look at/consider the content of
the attached document.

Please say hi to Ghislaine for me.
Wishing you the best!

Thanks,
Jen Doyle
